response:
```sql
SELECT s.name, COUNT(p.patient_id) AS enrolled, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT p.screen_pass) / COUNT(*), 1) AS screen_fail_pct
FROM app.sites s
JOIN app.studies st ON st.study_id = s.study_id
JOIN app.patients p ON p.site_id = s.site_id
WHERE st.code = 'MOON-2026' AND s.sponsor_id = :sponsor
GROUP BY s.name
ORDER BY enrolled
LIMIT 100;
```
